title: VIVID HEALTH - GUT HEALTH & IMMUNE - Wormwood 60 Capsules
body_html:
Nature's Parasite Fighter — Wormwood 60 Capsules

If you've been dealing with gut issues that don't seem to shift no matter what you try, Wormwood might be the missing piece. Used for centuries across traditional medicine systems, Artemisia annua (Wormwood) is one of the most researched herbs for addressing parasitic infections, digestive distress, and inflammation.

What It Does

Wormwood works as a broad-spectrum gut support herb — tackling parasites, soothing inflammation, and helping your digestive system get back on track. It's not a gentle herb; it's a serious one, and that's exactly why it works.

  • Targets intestinal parasites, worms, and microbial imbalances
  • Reduces gut inflammation and digestive discomfort
  • Supports liver function and bile production for better fat digestion
  • Powerful antioxidant properties combat oxidative stress
  • Traditionally used to support malaria recovery (artemisinin compound)
  • May help relieve bloating, cramping, and irregular bowel movements

Key Ingredient

Artemisia annua (Wormwood) — Contains artemisinin, a compound studied extensively for its antiparasitic and anti-inflammatory effects. This isn't folk medicine dressed up in a capsule; the science supports the tradition.

Who It's For

Anyone dealing with persistent gut issues, suspected parasitic infections, bloating that doesn't respond to dietary changes, or those going through a gut-reset protocol. Widely used across South Africa by practitioners supporting digestive and immune health.

How to Use

Take as directed on the label or by your health practitioner. Wormwood is typically used in cycles — it's not meant for indefinite daily use. Most protocols run 2–4 weeks on, then a break. Pair with Black Walnut and Clove for a full antiparasitic protocol.

Honest Notes

This is a potent herb. Not suitable during pregnancy. If you're on prescription medication, check with your doctor before starting. Side effects are uncommon at recommended doses, but high doses can cause nausea — stick to the dosage.

Part of the Vivid Health gut health range — formulated for results, not just reassurance.

title: VIVID HEALTH - GUT HEALTH - Black Walnut 60 Capsules
body_html:
Black Walnut — The Hull That Does the Heavy Lifting

Black Walnut hulls have been used medicinally for generations, and for good reason. The outer hull of the black walnut is dense with bioactive compounds — particularly juglone — that make it one of the most effective natural antiparasitic and antifungal herbs available without a prescription.

What It Does

This isn't your average walnut supplement. Black Walnut hull extract is used specifically for its action in the gut — clearing out parasites, fungi, and unwanted microbes while supporting the health of the gut lining.

  • Antiparasitic: targets intestinal worms and parasites
  • Antifungal properties help address Candida overgrowth
  • Rich in tannins — naturally astringent, supporting gut lining integrity
  • Antioxidant action reduces oxidative stress in the digestive tract
  • Supports healthy bowel function and motility
  • Anti-inflammatory properties soothe irritated gut tissue

Key Compounds

Juglone — the active compound in black walnut hull with demonstrated antiparasitic and antimicrobial effects. Tannins — support gut lining health and reduce inflammation. Natural iodine — trace amounts that support thyroid and metabolic function.

Who It's For

Black Walnut is ideal for anyone running a parasite cleanse protocol, dealing with suspected Candida overgrowth, or experiencing chronic digestive issues that haven't responded to standard interventions. Popular in South Africa as part of gut reset and detox programs.

How to Use

Follow label directions or your practitioner's protocol. Classically used as part of the "Hulda Clark" trio — Black Walnut, Wormwood, and Clove — taken together for a comprehensive antiparasitic cleanse. Take with water, away from food for best absorption.

Vivid Health — gut health tools that actually work.

title: VIVID HEALTH - GUT HEALTH - Clove 60 Capsules
body_html:
Clove — The Antiparasitic Spice in a Capsule

Cloves are far more than a kitchen spice. Packed with eugenol — one of the most potent natural antimicrobial compounds known — Clove extract has been used medicinally for centuries to address gut infections, dental pain, inflammation, and digestive distress. In capsule form, you get a therapeutic dose without having to eat handfuls of the stuff.

What It Does

Clove targets the gut with particular effectiveness, killing parasite eggs and larvae that other herbs miss. It's the third piece of the classic antiparasitic trio alongside Wormwood and Black Walnut — each targeting different stages of the parasite lifecycle.

  • Kills parasite eggs and larvae — critical for breaking the lifecycle
  • Potent antimicrobial: active against bacteria, fungi, and viruses
  • Strong antioxidant properties — one of the highest ORAC scores of any herb
  • Supports healthy digestion and relieves gas, bloating, and nausea
  • Natural analgesic — historically used for pain relief
  • Anti-inflammatory action supports gut and systemic health

Key Compound

Eugenol — the primary active compound in clove, responsible for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic effects. Research confirms eugenol's effectiveness against a wide range of pathogens including E. coli, Candida, and intestinal parasites.

Who It's For

Anyone doing a structured gut cleanse or parasite protocol. Also useful for those dealing with frequent digestive discomfort, bloating after eating, or suspected microbial imbalances. Widely recommended across South Africa by integrative health practitioners as part of a complete cleansing protocol.

How to Use

Take as directed on the label. For parasite protocols, Clove is most effective when taken alongside Wormwood and Black Walnut. Run for 2–4 weeks in cycles. Take with a meal to minimise digestive sensitivity.

Three herbs, one goal: a clean gut. Vivid Health makes it simple.

title: VIVID HEALTH - GUT HEALTH - Colon Flush 120 Capsules
body_html:
Colon Flush — Reset Your Gut from the Inside Out

Sometimes your digestive system needs a proper reset. Colon Flush is formulated with magnesium oxide to gently but effectively activate the colon, relieve constipation, and support a thorough internal cleanse. No harsh laxatives, no dependency — just a clean, functional approach to digestive detox.

What It Does

Colon Flush works through an osmotic mechanism — it draws water into the intestines, softening stool and stimulating natural bowel movement. The result is a thorough cleanse that removes built-up waste and supports a healthier gut environment going forward.

  • Relieves acute and chronic constipation safely and effectively
  • Draws water into the colon for a gentle osmotic flush effect
  • Helps remove accumulated waste and supports colon detoxification
  • Magnesium contributes to over 300 enzymatic functions in the body
  • Supports healthier bowel regularity ongoing
  • Non-stimulant — no cramping like some harsh laxatives cause

Key Ingredient

Magnesium Oxide — a well-researched form of magnesium with strong osmotic laxative properties. Unlike stimulant laxatives that force the bowel to contract, magnesium oxide works with the body's natural water-drawing mechanism — gentler and less habit-forming.

Who It's For

Anyone struggling with constipation, feeling backed up and sluggish, or wanting to start a gut cleanse with a thorough colon reset. Also useful before a structured detox program or antiparasitic protocol. Trusted by South Africans looking for a clean, effective colon support product.

How to Use

Take as directed on the label, preferably in the evening with a full glass of water. Expect bowel movement within 6–12 hours. Stay well hydrated during use. Not for long-term daily use without practitioner guidance — use in cycles or as needed for constipation relief.

Important Notes

Not suitable for use if you have kidney disease or are on kidney-affecting medication (magnesium is renally cleared). Pregnant women should consult a doctor before use. Keep hydration up — the osmotic effect works better and more comfortably with good water intake.

Vivid Health — gut health that actually moves things forward.

title: VIVID HEALTH - IMMUNE - Allergy Control 60 Capsules
body_html:
Stop Surviving Allergy Season. Start Managing It.

Hay fever, dust sensitivity, pet dander, food reactants — if your immune system fires up at the wrong things, every day becomes a management exercise. Vivid Health Allergy Control is a herbal and nutritional formula designed to calm the inflammatory cascade behind allergic reactions — naturally, without the sedation and side effects of antihistamines.

How Allergies Work (And Why Most Products Don't Fix Them)

Allergies are an overreaction by the immune system. When you're exposed to a trigger, your body releases histamine — causing the sneezing, itching, watery eyes, and congestion you know too well. Standard antihistamines block histamine receptors after the fact. This formula takes a different approach: it helps modulate the immune response upstream — reducing the tendency to overreact in the first place. For people looking for a natural allergy supplement in South Africa, Allergy Control is a serious alternative to the health store aisle.

Key Benefits

  • Reduces histamine response — targeted ingredients help stabilise mast cells, the source of histamine release
  • Anti-inflammatory action — addresses the inflammatory cascade that drives allergy symptoms
  • Supports respiratory tract lining — helps reduce mucosal irritation in the sinuses and airways
  • Non-sedating — unlike pharmaceutical antihistamines, no brain fog or drowsiness
  • Year-round use — safe for daily use as part of an ongoing allergy management protocol
  • Supports gut-immune connection — a healthy gut barrier reduces systemic immune hyperreactivity

Built for SA Conditions

South Africa has some of the highest rates of allergic disease on the continent — driven by high pollen counts, urban pollution, and dietary patterns. This formula was designed with that context in mind. It's not adapted from a Northern Hemisphere product; it's built for the SA environment.

Works Best As a Stack

For stronger allergy support, combine Allergy Control with Vivid Health Quercetin Complex (a natural mast cell stabiliser) and Buffered C (which has natural antihistamine properties at therapeutic doses). This is the basis of the Vivid Allergy Stack.

How to Use

Take 1–2 capsules daily with water. During peak allergy season, 2 capsules/day is recommended. 60 capsules per bottle.

Vivid Health IMMUNE — Your Defence, Dialled In

The IMMUNE range addresses the full spectrum of immune function — from acute infection defence to chronic overreaction management. Allergy Control is the flagship product for immune hyperreactivity — a condition that affects millions of South Africans and gets surprisingly little attention in the supplement space.

This product is not a replacement for prescribed allergy medication in severe cases. If you have asthma or anaphylaxis risk, consult your healthcare provider. Safe for long-term daily use in otherwise healthy individuals.

Astragalus — The Ancient Immune Adaptogen

Astragalus has been a cornerstone of Traditional Chinese Medicine for over 2000 years — and modern research is catching up with what practitioners have known all along. This adaptogenic root helps your immune system work smarter, your body handle stress better, and your energy levels stay consistent even when life gets demanding.

What It Does

Astragalus is an immune modulator — it doesn't just stimulate the immune system, it helps balance it. That's significant, because an immune system that's overactive (autoimmune issues) or underactive (frequent illness) both benefit from adaptogens that regulate rather than simply push.

  • Balances and strengthens immune system function
  • Reduces severity and duration of colds and respiratory infections
  • Adaptogenic properties support stress resilience and adrenal health
  • May reduce symptoms of chronic fatigue and improve energy levels
  • Anti-inflammatory — supports cardiovascular and metabolic health
  • Research suggests anti-ageing properties via telomere support
  • May support kidney function and blood sugar regulation

Key Compounds

Astragalosides — the primary active compounds, particularly Astragaloside IV, which shows immune-modulating, anti-inflammatory, and potential telomere-lengthening effects in research. Polysaccharides — complex carbohydrates that support immune cell activity.

Who It's For

Anyone dealing with recurrent infections, chronic fatigue, or burnout. Excellent for people under sustained stress who want immune support without harsh stimulation. Astragalus is popular in South Africa among those seeking long-term immune resilience rather than short-term fixes.

How to Use

Take as directed on the label. Astragalus works best with consistent, long-term use — this is not a take-when-sick herb. Build it in as a daily supplement and give it 4–8 weeks to show full effect. Safe for extended use at recommended doses.

Barley Grass 200g — Whole Food Nutrition in Every Spoonful

Barley Grass is one of nature's most nutrient-dense superfoods — a genuine whole-food supplement, not a synthetic vitamin stack. The young leaves of the barley plant are harvested at peak nutritional potency and carefully processed into a fine powder that delivers chlorophyll, vitamins, minerals, enzymes, and phytonutrients in their natural, synergistic form.

What It Does

Unlike isolated vitamin supplements, Barley Grass provides nutrition the way food does — with naturally co-occurring cofactors that enhance absorption and utilisation. It's particularly rich in chlorophyll, making it one of the best natural alkalising and detoxifying foods available.

  • Rich in chlorophyll — powerful detoxifier and natural alkaliser
  • Dense nutritional profile: vitamins A, C, E, K, and B-complex
  • Excellent source of minerals: calcium, iron, magnesium, potassium, zinc
  • Live enzymes that support digestion and nutrient absorption
  • Antioxidant-rich — reduces oxidative stress and cellular damage
  • Supports healthy pH balance and reduces dietary acid load
  • Natural energy support without stimulants
  • Supports liver detoxification pathways

What's In It

100% Barley Grass Powder — harvested young, dried at low temperature to preserve enzyme activity and nutritional integrity. No fillers, no synthetics, no additives. Just the leaf, in concentrated form. The 200g pack provides a generous supply for daily use, making it an economical whole-food supplement option across South Africa.

Who It's For

Anyone wanting to increase their daily nutrient intake with a whole-food source. Those with poor vegetable consumption who want meaningful micronutrient coverage. Health-conscious South Africans using greens powders as part of a wellness protocol. Athletes wanting natural alkalising support for recovery. title: VIVID HEALTH - STAY VIVID - Griffonia (5-HTP) 60 Capsules
body_html:
Feel More Like Yourself. Griffonia (5-HTP) for Mood, Sleep, and Mental Clarity.

If your mood is flat, sleep is patchy, or your mind won't quiet down at night — your serotonin system might need support. Vivid Health Griffonia (5-HTP) is derived from the seeds of the Griffonia simplicifolia plant and provides a natural precursor to serotonin and melatonin — two of the most critical molecules for emotional balance and restorative sleep.

What Is 5-HTP and Why Does It Matter?

5-HTP (5-Hydroxytryptophan) is the direct precursor to serotonin — the neurotransmitter at the centre of mood regulation, appetite control, and emotional stability. Unlike tryptophan (which requires an extra conversion step), 5-HTP crosses the blood-brain barrier efficiently and gets to work faster. It's one of the most well-researched mood-support compounds in nutritional science. For anyone searching for 5-HTP in South Africa, Vivid Health's Griffonia formula is a clean, properly dosed option.

Key Benefits

  • Mood support — helps raise serotonin levels naturally, supporting emotional resilience
  • Better sleep — converts to melatonin in the pineal gland, supporting deeper, more consistent sleep
  • Appetite regulation — serotonin plays a major role in satiety signals; helpful for those managing weight
  • Stress and anxiety relief — serotonin helps buffer the nervous system's stress response
  • Migraine reduction — research suggests 5-HTP may help reduce frequency and intensity of migraines
  • Cognitive calm — supports the "rest and digest" state that makes clear thinking possible

The Griffonia Difference

Griffonia simplicifolia is a West African climbing shrub whose seeds naturally contain some of the highest concentrations of 5-HTP found in nature. This is a real botanical source — not a synthetic compound. Vivid Health uses a standardised extract to ensure consistent potency with every capsule.

Who Is This For?

People dealing with low mood, poor sleep, chronic stress, or emotional eating. Also useful for those coming off stimulants or managing the effects of high-pressure work environments. Note: if you're on SSRIs or MAOIs, consult your doctor before using 5-HTP — the combination can affect serotonin levels significantly.

How to Use

Take 1–2 capsules daily, preferably in the evening with food. Start with 1 capsule to assess your response. 60 capsules per bottle.

Stay Vivid. Support Your Nervous System.

The "Stay Vivid" range is built for mental and emotional performance — not just physical. Because feeling good in your body means nothing if your mind is struggling. Griffonia 5-HTP is one of the most targeted tools in that range.

Not recommended for use with antidepressant medication without professional guidance. Not for use during pregnancy or breastfeeding without medical advice.

title: VIVID HEALTH - VIVID BODY - Bone Supreme 120 Capsules
body_html:
Build Stronger Bones. Protect What Holds You Up.

Your skeleton is doing serious work — every step, every lift, every late night. Vivid Health Bone Supreme is a targeted bone supplement formulated to support structural integrity, density, and long-term skeletal health. This isn't calcium alone. It's a complete matrix of the nutrients your bones actually need to stay strong.

Why Bone Supreme?

Most bone supplements give you calcium and call it done. The problem? Calcium alone doesn't cut it. Without the right co-factors — magnesium, vitamin D3, K2, boron — your body struggles to deposit calcium where it belongs. Bone Supreme delivers the full picture in one capsule, making it one of the most complete bone supplements available in South Africa.

Key Benefits

  • Supports bone density — critical for women post-40, active adults, and anyone with a family history of osteoporosis
  • Calcium + cofactors in one — D3 and K2 direct calcium into bone tissue, not arteries
  • Magnesium for bone structure — over 50% of your body's magnesium lives in bone; deficiency undermines everything
  • Boron for mineral retention — helps your body hold onto calcium and magnesium longer
  • Joint and cartilage support — goes beyond pure bone to the connective tissue around it
  • Vegetarian capsules — clean, no fillers, no binders

Who It's For

Bone Supreme is built for people who take their long-term health seriously. Whether you're an athlete protecting your frame, a woman managing bone loss after 40, or simply someone who understands that prevention beats treatment — this formula has your back. Literally.

Why Start Now?

Bone mass peaks in your late 20s to early 30s. After that, it's maintenance mode. The earlier you support bone health, the better position you're in at 60, 70, 80. Don't wait for a fracture to start paying attention.

How to Use

Take 2–4 capsules daily with food, or as directed by your healthcare practitioner. 120 capsules per bottle gives you a full month's supply at the higher dose.

Vivid Health — Functional Nutrition, South Africa-Made

Vivid Health formulates supplements for people who want results without the nonsense. No outrageous claims. No filler ingredients. Just clean, purposeful formulas — the kind you'd actually recommend to someone you care about.

Each batch is manufactured to strict quality standards. As with all supplements, consult a healthcare professional if you are pregnant, nursing, or on chronic medication.

Your Gut Runs the Show — Give It What It Needs

Digestive health isn't just about avoiding bloating. The gut microbiome influences immunity, mental health, nutrient absorption, and systemic inflammation. VIVID HEALTH - VIVID BODY - Coenzyme Q10 60 Capsules supports a healthy, balanced gut ecosystem from the inside.

  • Digestive comfort: Reduces bloating, gas, and irregularity

title: VIVID HEALTH - VIVID NOURISHMENT - Turmeric 250g
body_html:
Turmeric Powder 250g — Anti-Inflammatory Support from the Root

Turmeric has been used in Indian medicine and cooking for thousands of years — and modern research has confirmed what traditional practitioners knew: curcumin, the active compound in turmeric, is one of the most potent natural anti-inflammatory agents ever studied. Vivid Health Turmeric Powder is pure, high-curcumin, and exactly what you need for cooking and supplementation.

What Curcumin Actually Does

  • Reduces systemic inflammation: Curcumin inhibits NF-kB, a key driver of chronic inflammation at the molecular level
  • Joint support: Multiple clinical studies show significant improvement in joint pain and mobility
  • Brain health: May increase BDNF (brain-derived neurotrophic factor) — a protein associated with better memory and reduced depression risk
  • Antioxidant powerhouse: Neutralises free radicals while boosting the body's own antioxidant enzymes
  • Digestive support: Stimulates bile production for better fat digestion
  • Heart health: Improves endothelial function and may reduce LDL oxidation

The Absorption Factor

Curcumin is poorly absorbed on its own. To increase bioavailability significantly, always take it with black pepper (piperine) or a fat source. Add it to cooking with oil, or pair your turmeric dose with a pinch of black pepper.

How to Use

Add to curries, soups, and stews. Mix into warm milk or golden milk. Stir into smoothies. Add to scrambled eggs or rice. The 250g pack is ideal for households that cook with turmeric regularly or use it in daily wellness drinks.

Pure, High-Curcumin Turmeric

No additives, no fillers, no dilution. Just turmeric ground to retain maximum curcumin content.

title: VIVID HEALTH - WOMAN - Angus Castus 60 Capsules
body_html:
Agnus Castus 60 Capsules — Hormonal Balance for Women

Agnus castus (also known as chaste tree or Vitex) has been used in women's health for centuries, and modern research has confirmed its effectiveness. It works primarily on the pituitary gland to support the hormonal balance between oestrogen and progesterone — making it one of the most targeted natural options for menstrual and hormonal issues.

What Agnus Castus Addresses

  • PMS symptoms: Clinical trials show meaningful reduction in mood swings, breast tenderness, bloating, and irritability
  • Irregular cycles: Supports cycle regularity by normalising LH and FSH signalling
  • Progesterone support: Agnus castus stimulates progesterone production — helpful for luteal phase deficiency
  • Prolactin regulation: Reduces elevated prolactin, which can interfere with cycle regularity and fertility
  • Perimenopausal support: May ease the transition by helping stabilise hormonal fluctuations

How It Works

Unlike hormone replacement, Agnus castus doesn't supply exogenous hormones. It acts on dopamine receptors in the pituitary gland, which in turn regulates prolactin and helps balance the oestrogen-progesterone ratio. This makes it a more gentle, adaptogenic approach to hormonal imbalance rather than a direct intervention.

How to Use

Take 1–2 capsules daily with water, preferably in the morning. Agnus castus is a slower-acting herb — give it at least 3 months of consistent use to properly assess results. Best taken at the same time each day.

Important Note

Not recommended during pregnancy or while on hormonal contraceptives. Consult a healthcare practitioner if you're on any hormonal medication.

Targeted. Gentle. Evidence-supported. Hormonal balance isn't complicated when you've got the right tools.

Unlike many adaptogens that work through the adrenal axis, maca is classified as an endocrine adaptogen — it supports the hypothalamus and pituitary gland, which are the master regulators of hormonal output. This means maca doesn't supply hormones directly; it helps your body regulate them more effectively. That's a meaningful distinction. If you're looking for maca capsules in South Africa that are potent and purposeful, this is the one.

  • Perimenopause and menopause support — reduces hot flushes, mood swings, and sleep disruption
  • Mood and mental clarity — supports serotonin pathways and reduces stress-related hormonal chaos
  • Bone density — post-menopausal women benefit from maca's support for mineral retention

This product sits in Vivid Health's WOMAN range — a targeted collection built around the specific physiological needs of women at different life stages. Maca isn't a one-size-fits-all supplement; it's particularly effective for women navigating the hormonal shifts of their 30s, 40s, and beyond.

What to Expect

Maca is not an overnight fix. Most women notice changes within 3–6 weeks of consistent use — better energy first, then mood stabilisation, and eventually hormonal improvements. Give it a full cycle to assess properly.

Take 1–2 capsules daily with food. Best taken in the morning for energy support. 60 capsules per bottle — a full month's supply at 2 capsules/day.

Vivid Health — Built for Real Women's Health

No pink packaging gimmicks. No vague "women's wellness" promises. Just a clean maca extract at a dose that actually works, for women who want to feel like themselves again — or better.

Maca is generally well tolerated. Not recommended during pregnancy without professional guidance. If you have a hormone-sensitive condition (e.g., estrogen-dependent cancers), consult your healthcare provider before use.
